scripts.test:contracts: rm -rf /tmp/lerms-contract-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir /tmp/lerms-contract-tests --noEmit false src/contracts/first-vertical.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-worker-client.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload.ts tests/first-vertical-contracts.ts tests/hill-of-hills-terrain.ts tests/hill-of-hills-worker-contracts.ts tests/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload-contracts.ts && node /tmp/lerms-contract-tests/tests/first-vertical-contracts.js && node /tmp/lerms-contract-tests/tests/hill-of-hills-terrain.js && node /tmp/lerms-contract-tests/tests/hill-of-hills-worker-contracts.js && node /tmp/lerms-contract-tests/tests/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload-contracts.js
scripts.witness:hill-preview-bench-payload: rm -rf /tmp/lerms-hill-preview-bench-payload && tsc --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir /tmp/lerms-hill-preview-bench-payload --noEmit false src/contracts/first-vertical.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload.ts && node /tmp/lerms-hill-preview-bench-payload/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload.js
